body: Hi Dad — Emma's school recital is Thursday at 6. Want to come to ours for Sunday dinner after, like usual? Kevin's grilling.
snippet: Hi Dad — Emma's school recital is Thursday at 6. Want to come to ours for Sunday dinner af
subject: Sunday dinner + Emma's recital

body: Wouldn't miss the recital. I'll bring the cutting board I finished for her teacher. See you Sunday.

subject: Re: Sunday dinner + Emma's recital

snippet: Hey man — Tuesday league at Liberty Lanes still on? And I'm hosting poker Friday, $20 buy-
subject: Bowling Tuesday + poker Friday?

body: Tuesday's good. I'm in for Friday too. Tell Carol I said thanks in advance.

subject: Re: Bowling Tuesday + poker Friday?

body: Perfect. Bring your A-game, I've been practicing. Go Steelers.
snippet: Perfect. Bring your A-game, I've been practicing. Go Steelers.

subject: Kevin wants to learn woodworking

body: Send him over. We'll start with a cutting board, hard to ruin one. Tell him to wear closed-toe shoes.
snippet: Send him over. We'll start with a cutting board, hard to ruin one. Tell him to wear closed
subject: Re: Kevin wants to learn woodworking

body: He's thrilled. Is this Saturday too soon? He can be there by 9.
snippet: He's thrilled. Is this Saturday too soon? He can be there by 9.
subject: Re: Kevin wants to learn woodworking

body: Saturday's fine. Coffee's on by 7, radio's on by 8. Door's open.

subject: Re: Kevin wants to learn woodworking

subject: Thanksgiving plans

body: Come here. I'll do the turkey and your mother's stuffed cabbage. Bring Emma and Jack early so Jack can nap on the couch.
snippet: Come here. I'll do the turkey and your mother's stuffed cabbage. Bring Emma and Jack early

body: Done. Emma wants to help with the dumplings — she's been practicing the pinch you showed her.

body: Good. Tell her Great-Grandma Mary will be the judge. I'll pick Mom up from Greenfield that morning.

subject: Re: Thanksgiving plans

body: Perfect. Aunt Rose said she'll bring the pies. See you Thursday, love you Dad.

subject: Re: Thanksgiving plans

body: Hi Dad — Greenfield sent this month's statement, $1,800. I'll send Aunt Rose her half so you two can settle up. Nothing you need to do.
